home.lede: Xakamaynta sahaminta & xaqiijinta ee Vortex shabakada isku-faca ah.
home.fingerprintDesc: Ku dheji furahan guud ee macmiilkaaga Vortex. Jawaab kasta oo ka timaadda kontoroolka waa lagu saxeexaa - is-maan-dhaaf la'aantu waxay la macno tahay in qof wax faragelinayo.
home.step2: Ka dooro qaabka shabakadda §002§ ee saaxir dejinta.
home.step3: Ku dheji URL maamulaha (oo si toos ah loogu xalliyo SNS) ama URL laga soo galo goobtan.
home.step4: Xaqiiji in pubkey ee ku jira abkaagu uu la mid yahay sawirka faraha ee sare.
home.step5: waad ku xidhan tahay Wax kasta oo kale (liiska noodhka, saxeexyada) si toos ah ayaa wax looga qabtaa.
home.nodesDesc: Dhammaan facooda diiwaangashan, miisaankooda, dhibcaha dhamaadka, iyo ilaha xaqiijinta.
home.entriesDesc: URL-yada bootstrap ee macaamiisha markii ugu horeysay - Cloudflare tunnels, Tor, IPFS, toos ah.
home.mirrorsDesc: Martigaliyayaasha kale ee u adeegaya isla qoraalkan saxeexan haddii faafreeb la sameeyo.
home.securityDesc: Burbur buuxa oo ah waxa si qarsoodi ah loo xaqiijiyay, waxa aan ahayn, iyo sababta.

nodes.title: noodhadhka diiwaangashan
nodes.lede: Faca kasta oo maamuluhu wuu og yahay. Macaamiishu waxay akhriyaan liiskan, xaqiiji saxeexa, oo soo doortaan noodhka si ay ugu xidhmaan miisaanka. Neef cusub oo xidhan ayaa miisaankiisu yahay 1.0; Noodh duugoobay ama aan la xidhin ayaa u qudhmi doona dhanka 0 si taraafiggu u qulqulo si ay u noolaadaan, facooda la aamini karo oo keliya.
nodes.legendDualD: Ka diiwaan gashan kontaroolaha IYO ku xidhxidhan silsiladda Solana. Laba markhaati oo madax banaan ayaa xaqiijinaya xashiish kood.
nodes.legendCtrlD: Ka diiwaan gashan HTTP kantaroolaha. Saxiixa waxa uu caddaynayaa in noodhka uu leeyahay furihiisa gaarka ah, laakiin hufnaanta koodku kuma xidhna silsiladda.
nodes.legendUnverifD: Laga yaqaan faylka qaabeynta ama xanta. Weli lama xaqiijin Si taxaddar leh ula dhaqan - qof kastaa wuu xayeysiin karaa pubkey ilaa caddayntu timaado.

entries.title: Gelida URL-yada
entries.lede: Dhibcaha bilawga ah ee macmiilka aan weli lahayn saaxiibo. URL kasta oo gelitaanka waa hab lagu gaadho kontaroolaha - iyada oo loo marayo Cloudflare tunnel, Tor, IPFS albaabka, ama aag toos ah. Mid kast ku koobi abka Vortex kaaga marka ugu horeysa ee la soo saaro.
entries.typeTunnelD: Ciwaanka bilaashka ah *.trycloudflare.com Xisaab looma baahna URL wuu is beddelaa marka tunnelku dib u bilaabo - ula dhaqmo sidii wax dhacay.
entries.typeTorD: .cinwaanka basasha, lagu gaari karo kaliya Tor. Faafreeb-caddayn, tartiib tartiib ah. Wuxuu u baahan yahay Tor macmiil ama buundada.
entries.typeIpfsD: Nuqulka ciwaanka ku jira ee dhinaca hore ee taagan Laga soo bilaabo albaab kasta oo IPFS - ma jiro hal server oo xannibaya.
entries.typeDirectD: Domain joogto ah + TLS. Ugu dhaqsiyaha badan laakiin la xannibi karo heerka DNS/IP.

mirrors.title: Goobaha muraayadaha
mirrors.lede: Meelo kale oo u adeega isla nuxurka saxeexan ee goobtan. Faa'iido leh haddii vortexx.sol laga xannibo DNS/ISP. Muraayad kasta si xilliyo ah ayaa loo hubiyaa - dhibicda midabka leh ayaa ka tarjumaysa natiijada baaritaanka ugu dambeysa.
mirrors.healthyD: Baaritaan lagu sameeyay 5tii daqiiqo ee ugu dambeysay oo ay ku jawaabtay OK. Ammaan in la isticmaalo hadda Latency ayaa lagu muujiyay kaadhka.
mirrors.unreachableD: Baadhitaankii u dambeeyay wuu guuldarraystay - xidhidhku waa la diiday, wakhtigu dhamaaday, 5xx. Muraayada waxaa laga yaabaa inay hoos u dhacdo, xanniban tahay, ama culeys badan. Isku day midda xigta.
mirrors.noprobeD: Tor Xaaladda lama garanayo - isticmaal browserka §§003§ si aad u tijaabiso.

security.title: Qaabka amniga
security.lede: Dhab ahaan waxa si qarsoodi ah loo xaqiijiyay, waxa aan ahayn, iyo sida fure kasta oo nidaamka ku jira u kasbado - ama u lumiyo - kalsoonidaada. Akhri tan ka hor intaadan ku xidhin macaamiil cusub kontaroolaha aadan adigu maamulin.
security.treasurySub: Jeebka Solana ee hela khidmadaha borotokoolka (ka diwaangeli khidmadaha qanjidhada cusub + 20% oo laga jaray is-diiwaangelinta premium) oo u qaybiya inta soo hadhay abaal-marin ahaan hawl-wadeennada firfircoon. Qof kastaa wuu xisaabin karaa qulqulka/ka bixista silsiladda.
security.treasury1: Daah-furnaan silsilad-toona - ciwaanka sare waa mulkiilaha §004§ ee Solana Magaca Adeegga. Soo gelista kasta ( khidmadaha diwaan gelinta, is-diiwaangelinta) iyo abaal-marin kasta oo bixisa waa macaamil ganacsi oo Solana saxeexan - qof kasta ayaa xaqiijin kara, oo ay ku jiraan adiga.
security.treasury2: Qiimaha kala qaybinta - 70% isdiiwaangelin kasta oo khidmad kastaa waxay aadaa barkada abaal-marinaha (oo loo qaybiyay pro-rata si loo isticmaalo isticmaalka + saamiga), 20% waxay maalgelisaa horumarinta asaasiga ah, 10% waa la gubay / waxaa loo haystaa caymis ahaan. Diiwangelinta khidmadaha waxay kuxirantahay aqoonsiga noodhka iyo anti-sybil.
security.treasury3: Caveat haynta - ilaa inta qandaraaska caqliga leh ee lacag bixinta la geeyo, khasnadda ayaa u dhaqanta sidii ilaaliye ku meel gaar ah. Tan si daacad ah ayaa halkan loogu diiwaangeliyay si guudna waa loola socdaa. Qandaraaska casriga ah wuxuu bedeli doonaa gacanta ku haynta marka la baaro + dhulalka maamulka silsiladda.
